CustomField.formula: IF(OR(Year1_Subscription_Exists__c = true, Year2_Subscription_Exists__c = true, Year3_Subscription_Exists__c = true, Year4_Subscription_Exists__c = true, Year5_Subscription_Exists__c = true, Year6_Subscription_Exists__c = true), true , false)
CustomField.label: Subscription Exists
